allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=8 nhihb-gpu-2080 'echo "===internet==="; curl -sS -m 8 -o /dev/null -w "pypi:%{http_code}\\n" https://pypi.org/simple/ 2>&1; curl -sS -m 8 -o /dev/null -w "hf:%{http_code}\\n" https://huggingface.co 2>&1; echo "===existing venv/stt==="; ls -d ~/stt-server 2>&1; ls ~/.cache/huggingface 2>&1 | head -3; echo "===tmux/ffmpeg==="; which tmux ffmpeg 2>&1')

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=15 nhihb-gpu-2080 'echo "=== children of dpkg configure \(62521\) ==="; ps --ppid 62521 -o pid,stat,etime,cmd 2>/dev/null; echo "=== any gcc/make/cc1 building? ==="; pgrep -a "gcc|make|cc1|ld|nvidia" | grep -v grep | head; echo "=== dkms status ==="; dkms status 2>&1 | head; echo "=== dkms make.log tail ==="; find /var/lib/dkms -name make.log 2>/dev/null -exec tail -15 {} \\; | tail -25')
